all.en: This document outlines the updated security badge policy effective the first of next month.
all.zh: 本文件說明自下月一日起生效的最新門禁識別證管理辦法。

all.en: Every employee, contractor, and long-term visitor must carry an official security badge.
all.zh: 每位員工、約聘人員與長期訪客皆須隨身攜帶官方識別證。

all.en: The badge serves as both visual identification and the primary means of access control.
all.zh: 識別證同時作為視覺識別與主要的門禁管控工具。

all.en: Badges must be visibly worn above the waist at all times while inside company facilities.
all.zh: 於公司範圍內，識別證須隨時清楚配戴於腰部以上位置。

all.en: Employees should never share, lend, or duplicate their badge under any circumstances.
all.zh: 員工在任何情況下皆不得將識別證借出、共用或複製。

all.en: Tailgating, or allowing others to enter behind you without scanning, is strictly prohibited.
all.zh: 嚴禁尾隨進入，亦即允許他人在未刷卡的情況下跟隨您進入。

all.en: If you forget your badge, please report to the reception desk to obtain a temporary pass.
all.zh: 若忘記攜帶識別證，請至接待櫃台領取臨時通行證。

all.en: Temporary passes are valid for one business day and must be returned before leaving.
all.zh: 臨時通行證有效期為一個工作天，離開前須繳回。

all.en: Lost or stolen badges must be reported to the security office within twenty-four hours.
all.zh: 識別證遺失或失竊時，須於二十四小時內向保全辦公室通報。

all.en: Replacement badges carry an administrative fee that will be deducted from the next paycheck.
all.zh: 補發識別證將酌收行政費用，並由下次薪資中扣除。

all.en: Badge readers are installed at all main entrances, elevator banks, and server rooms.
all.zh: 所有主要出入口、電梯區與機房均設有讀卡感應器。

all.en: Access to restricted areas requires additional authorization granted by the security team.
all.zh: 進入管制區需另行取得保全團隊核發的授權。

all.en: Server rooms, finance archives, and the legal vault are designated restricted areas.
all.zh: 機房、財務資料庫與法務文件庫為指定的管制區。

all.en: Requests for elevated access must be submitted through the digital security portal.
all.zh: 提升權限的申請須透過數位保全入口網站提交。

all.en: Each request requires approval from both the area owner and the chief information officer.
all.zh: 每項申請須同時取得區域負責人與資訊長的核准。

all.en: Visitor badges are issued at the reception desk and remain valid for a single day only.
all.zh: 訪客證於接待櫃台發放，僅當日有效。

all.en: Visitors must be escorted by an employee at all times within the workspace areas.
all.zh: 訪客於辦公區域內須全程由員工陪同。

all.en: Photography and video recording inside the building require prior written approval.
all.zh: 於大樓內進行拍照或錄影需事先取得書面核可。

all.en: Badge data is logged automatically and may be reviewed during security audits.
all.zh: 識別證資料會自動記錄，並可能在保全稽核時被審閱。

all.en: Audit logs are retained for ninety days in accordance with our internal data retention policy.
all.zh: 依照本公司內部資料保存政策，稽核記錄將保留九十天。

all.en: Repeated policy violations may result in disciplinary action under company conduct rules.
all.zh: 重複違反本辦法可能依公司行為規範予以懲處。

all.en: Damaged badges should be exchanged at the security office during regular business hours.
all.zh: 識別證若有損壞，應於正常上班時間至保全辦公室換發。

all.en: All badges remain company property and must be returned upon termination of employment.
all.zh: 所有識別證均為公司財產，員工離職時須予以繳回。

all.en: If you have questions about this policy, please contact the security operations manager.
all.zh: 如對本辦法有任何疑問，請聯繫保全營運經理。

all.en: New hires will receive their initial badge during the first day of company orientation.
all.zh: 新進員工將於公司新人訓練的第一天領取個人識別證。

all.en: Badges are programmed individually based on each employee's role and assigned work location.
all.zh: 識別證會依員工的職務與指派工作地點個別寫入權限。

all.en: Remote workers visiting the office must request a temporary pass through their manager.
all.zh: 返回辦公室洽公的遠距員工，須透過主管申請臨時通行證。

all.en: Please do not attach decorative stickers or covers that obscure the badge photograph.
all.zh: 請勿黏貼可能遮擋識別證照片的裝飾貼紙或外殼。

all.en: Faulty card readers should be reported to the facilities help desk for prompt servicing.
all.zh: 讀卡機若故障，請通報設施服務台以便儘速維修。

all.en: Quarterly security drills will test our compliance with badge and access control standards.
all.zh: 每季的保全演練將檢驗我們對識別證與門禁管控規範的遵循程度。

all.en: Department managers are responsible for collecting badges from employees who change teams.
all.zh: 部門主管負責向轉調團隊的員工回收原有識別證。

all.en: Contractors completing assignments must surrender their badges on the final working day.
all.zh: 結束委託案的約聘人員須於最後一個工作日繳回識別證。

all.en: An updated policy summary will be circulated by email to all staff on Monday morning.
all.zh: 更新後的政策摘要將於週一上午以電子郵件寄送給全體同仁。

all.en: Thank you for helping maintain a safe and secure environment for everyone in the company.
all.zh: 感謝您協助維護公司所有同仁的安全與保障環境。

all.en: Biometric verification will be piloted next quarter at the main lobby of the headquarters building.
all.zh: 下一季將在總部大樓主大廳試行生物辨識驗證。

all.en: Employees may register their fingerprints voluntarily at the security office during business hours.
all.zh: 員工可於上班時間自願至保全辦公室登錄指紋資料。

all.en: Anyone discovering an unattended badge should bring it directly to the nearest security checkpoint.
all.zh: 如發現無人看管的識別證，請直接送至最近的保全檢查站。

all.en: Annual policy refresher training will be assigned to all employees through the learning portal.
all.zh: 全體員工將透過學習平台接受年度政策複訓課程。

all.en: Departments hosting external auditors must request guest badges at least two days in advance.
all.zh: 接待外部稽核人員的部門須至少提前兩天申請訪客證。

all.en: Emergency exit doors are alarmed and should only be used during evacuation drills or genuine emergencies.
all.zh: 緊急出口門配有警報，僅限疏散演習或真正緊急情況時使用。

all.en: Surveillance cameras at every entrance complement our badge system to ensure complete access oversight.
all.zh: 每個入口的監視攝影機與識別證系統相輔相成，確保完整的進出監督。

all.en: Building access outside regular hours requires prior approval from your direct line manager.
all.zh: 正常工時以外進入大樓需事先取得直屬主管核准。

all.en: Tenant companies sharing the building must coordinate badge formats with our central security desk.
all.zh: 與本公司共用大樓的承租企業須與中央保全櫃台協調識別證規格。

all.en: Your cooperation strengthens our overall security posture and protects sensitive business operations daily.
all.zh: 您的配合將強化整體保全態勢，並每日守護敏感的營運資訊。

all.en: I left my badge at home this morning, so I had to walk back from the parking lot.
all.zh: 我今天早上把識別證忘在家裡，只好從停車場走回去拿。

all.en: My colleague kindly held the door open for me, but I still scanned my own badge anyway.
all.zh: 同事好心幫我扶著門，但我還是自己刷了一下卡。

all.en: Have you ever locked yourself out of the office on a Sunday when no one was around?
all.zh: 你有沒有試過星期天辦公室沒人時，自己被反鎖在門外？

all.en: My new badge photo turned out so terrible that I would rather not look at it every day.
all.zh: 我新的識別證照片實在太醜了，我寧願每天都不要看到它。

all.en: Last winter I dropped my badge in the snow and the magnetic strip stopped working completely.
all.zh: 去年冬天我把識別證掉進雪裡，磁條就完全失效了。

all.en: The security guard at the front desk knows me by name and always greets me cheerfully.
all.zh: 前台的保全認得我，每次都親切地叫我的名字打招呼。

all.en: I keep my badge on a lanyard because clipping it to my belt always makes my pants droop.
all.zh: 我都用識別證頸繩，因為夾在腰帶上總會把褲子拉鬆。

all.en: Once I accidentally walked into the wrong floor's office and the door alarm went off loudly.
all.zh: 有一次我不小心走錯樓層進入別人辦公室，門禁警報立刻大聲響起。

all.en: When my friend visited for lunch, getting her a visitor pass took longer than the meal itself.
all.zh: 朋友來找我吃午餐，幫她辦訪客證的時間比吃飯還久。

all.en: I always forget where I put my badge after long weekends, and the panic in the morning is real.
all.zh: 連假後我總是忘記識別證放哪裡，早上找的時候真的會手忙腳亂。
